sources.title: Hunting Day (2022) Survival thriller: a pulse‑pounding game of hide & seek 4K
sources.description:
After The Hunter fells Sarah’s treasured Young Sister amid the silent pines, Sarah flips the script from quarry to crafty pursuer. What follows is a breathless forest chess match of snare‑and‑counter‑snare, as she races to outwit the relentless marksman before dawn crowns the true apex predator.

Director: Julien Patrice
Cast: Clothilde Huet

Director: Julien Patrice; Négatif Ju Patrice
Writers: Julien Patrice; Manu Dizio

Main cast:
Steve Bardoul – The Hunter
Cloe Duez – The Young Sister
Clothilde Huet – Sarah

Genres: Horror, Thriller
Release date: 28 October 2022
Filming location: France


https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2gsu7VGzgdYTMq_LE7cyJT3fio8pHOP8

@CultCinemaClassics

sources.title: Hunting Day | Full Movie | Intense Survival Thriller | Fight or Die
sources.description:
Hunting Day | Full Movie | Intense Survival Thriller | Fight or Die | Action Thriller | Fight for Survival

Deep in a threatening forest, Sarah faces off with the brutal hunter who killed her sister. It's a cat and mouse fight for survival in this atmospheric thriller, this international story features no dialogue.

2022.  Stars: Steve Bardoul, Cloe Duez, Clothilde Huet
